diagrams.title: Complete Binary Tree Representation
diagrams.description: Shows how a complete binary tree with heap property maps to array indices
diagrams.purpose: Understand array-based heap implementation and index calculations

diagrams.title: Max-Heap Property
diagrams.description: Visual of max-heap with parent ≥ children at all nodes
elements: Tree satisfies complete binary tree property
diagrams.purpose: Visualize heap property enforcement and understand why root always has maximum/minimum

diagrams.title: Heapify Operation Steps
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of max-heapify on a subtree
elements: Start with node violating heap property
Compare with left and right children
Swap with larger child if needed
diagrams.purpose: Understand how heapify restores heap property in O(log n) time

diagrams.title: Heapsort Algorithm Flow
diagrams.description: Complete flowchart of heapsort showing build-heap and sort phases
diagrams.purpose: Understand full heapsort process and time complexity contributions
